## read() function

Reads the value of a bindable property.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare function read<T>(bindable: Bindable<T>): T;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

bindable


</td><td>

[Bindable](./openrct2-flexui.bindable.md)<!-- -->&lt;T&gt;


</td><td>

A property that is bindable.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
**Returns:**

T

If the bindable is a store, it returns the stored value. If it's a regular value, that value will be returned as is.
